title: coriaria duthiei
intro: Coriaria duthiei, also known as Himalayan coriaria or Bhui ghas, is a plant species within the Coriariaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, fever, and digestive problems, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and relieving pain. Coriaria duthiei is typically prepared as a decoction, powder, or infusion for use in traditional herbal remedies.
